---
title: "Quiz 2 — Dummy Variables & the *t*-Test"
---

These questions check how a **0/1 dummy variable** turns a two-group comparison into a
regression — the model $\hat{y} = b_0 + b_1 D$ where $D$ indicates group membership —
and how that connects to the two-sample *t*-test. They mirror **Homework 2** and draw
on **Chapter 1** of the Lecture Notes.

Answer each question and press **Check** for instant, explained feedback. Your score
and progress are saved in this browser; press **Reset quiz** to start over.

```{=html}
<div class="quizbank" data-bank="../assets/banks/quiz2.json" data-show-title="false"></div>
<script type="module" src="../assets/quiz-engine.js"></script>
```
